message:
feat: graph-ranking stub, mmap-backed VectorIndex, HNSW simplification, and multiple bug fixes

Major changes across 10 crates spanning new features, memory
optimizations, and correctness fixes:

Graph Ranking (fusion, core):
- Add feature-gated graph_rank module with GraphRanker stub for
  phase-1 fusion pipeline, configurable via FRANKENSEARCH_GRAPH_RANKING_*
  env vars with default weight 0.5

Memory & Performance (index):
- Replace heap-allocated Vec<u8> with memmap2::MmapMut for VectorIndex
  data backing, eliminating full-file reads into heap memory
- Remove CHSW on-disk serialization format from HnswIndex (save/load
  methods, magic bytes, read/write helpers) — the format merely dumped
  vectors and rebuilt on load, doubling RAM usage with no graph
  persistence benefit; HNSW is now rebuilt from VectorIndex on startup
- Remove vectors field from HnswIndex to halve per-index RAM usage
- Replace HashMap-based doc_id join in TwoTierIndex with O(n) sorted
  merge-join; replace in-memory doc_ids Vec with on-demand mmap lookups

Bug Fixes:
- Fix RRF duplicate doc score inflation: dedup within each source so
  only the best-ranked occurrence contributes to fused score
- Fix TOCTOU race in storage pipeline backpressure: move depth check
  inside the transaction; reorder mark_embedded before complete
- Fix embed matrix parser: use checked_mul for overflow safety, reject
  both too-short and too-long tensor data with exact-length validation
- Fix embed staging dir created as sibling of dest_dir (not inside it)
  with PID+nanos uniqueness for concurrent promotion safety
- Fix FSFS runtime: propagate soft_delete errors instead of swallowing
- Fix conformal quantile_index: saturating_sub prevents underflow panic

Portability & Config:
- Gate Linux /proc pressure reads behind cfg(target_os = "linux") with
  zero-valued fallback on other platforms
- Add relative config path resolution against config file parent dir
- Relax workspace unsafe_code lint from forbid to deny for mmap crate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,7 +103,8 @@ time = { version = "0.3", features = ["formatting", "parsing"] }
 sysinfo = "0.33"
 
 [workspace.lints.rust]
-unsafe_code = "forbid"
+# `deny` instead of `forbid` so crates that need unsafe (e.g. mmap) can opt in.
+unsafe_code = "deny"
 
 [workspace.lints.clippy]
 pedantic = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ repository.workspace = true
 default = []
 lexical = ["dep:frankensearch-lexical"]
 rerank = ["dep:frankensearch-rerank"]
+graph = []
 
 [dependencies]
 frankensearch-core = { workspace = true }
